rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE annexes
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions
Avoid encoding AADL property values as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` with proper colon-separated type annotations
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-specific bindings in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about missing packages or property sets
